name: Kolovrat Rune Leather Necklace
description: A handcrafted leather necklace bearing the rune of Kolovrat, symbolizing resilience, divine guidance, and the unstoppable movement of life’s energy.

name: Bereginya Rune Leather Necklace
symbol: Bereginya (protectress of home, life, and nurturing power)
description: A leather necklace featuring the rune of Mokosh, symbolizing protection, nurturing care, and the sacred force that shields family, home, and spirit.

name: Stribog Rune Leather Necklace
symbol: Stribog (god of wind and ancestral air)
description: A rune necklace dedicated to Stribog, symbolizing shifting fate, spreading influence, and the power carried on invisible air.

name: Dodola Rune Leather Necklace
symbol: Dodola (rain maiden and bringer of fertile showers)
description: A rune necklace dedicated to Dodola, symbolizing replenishment, healing rains, and the natural rhythms that sustain growth and abundance.

name: Alatyr Rune Leather Necklace
symbol: Alatyr (The Sacred Stone of Creation and Cosmic Order)
description: A rune necklace dedicated to Alatyr, symbolizing the source of creation, healing power, and the stabilizing force that aligns all things.

name: Thrones of the Old Gods Card Pack
description: A themed booster pack featuring Slavic deities such as Perun, Mokosh, and Veles. Each pack contains 8 mythology character cards and 1 limited edition NFT card. The NFT grants you ownership of the entire art & exclusive NFT benefits.

name: Veils of Sorcery Card Pack
description: A themed booster pack featuring Slavic magicians & shapeshifters such as Koldun, Ved'ma, and Oboroten. Each pack contains 8 mythology character cards and 1 limited edition NFT card. The NFT grants you ownership of the entire art & exclusive NFT benefits.

name: Fangs of Myth & Oath Card Pack
description: A themed booster pack featuring Slavic monsters & mythical animals such as Sivka-Burka, Viy, and Baba Yaga. Each pack contains 8 mythology character cards and 1 limited edition NFT card. The NFT grants you ownership of the entire art & exclusive NFT benefits.

name: Oaths of Crown & Sword Card Pack
description: A themed booster pack featuring Slavic heroes & nobles such as Ivan Tsarevich, Elena the Wise, and Tsar Dadon. Each pack contains 8 mythology character cards and 1 limited edition NFT card. The NFT grants you ownership of the entire art & exclusive NFT benefits.

name: Whispers of Hearth & Forest Card Pack
description: A themed booster pack featuring Slavic household & nature spirits such as the Domovoi, Rusalka, and Kimimora. Each pack contains 8 mythology character cards and 1 limited edition NFT card. The NFT grants you ownership of the entire art & exclusive NFT benefits.

name: Singapore Myths Card Pack
description: A themed booster pack featuring characters from Singapore myths, legends, & local beliefs such as the Pontianak, Badang, and Kusu Island. Each pack contains 8 mythology character cards and 1 limited edition NFT card. The NFT grants you ownership of the entire art & exclusive NFT benefits.

name: Custom Leather Watch Painting
description: A custom hand-painted leather artwork inspired by your chosen watch. Each piece is unique and made to order.
